blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
